label: 泊松盘采样
description: 使用 Bridson 快速泊松盘采样算法在指定大小的区域内生成均匀分布的采样点，采样点之间保持最小距离
description-en: Generates uniformly distributed sample points in a given area using Bridson's fast Poisson disk sampling, maintaining a minimum distance between points.
icon: 一片区域内均匀散布着大小一致的圆点，点与点之间保持等距间隔，既不太密也不太疏，扁平简洁风格，主色深蓝浅蓝两色

inputs.name: width
inputs.label: 网格宽度
inputs.description-en: Width (number of columns) of the sampling area.

inputs.name: height
inputs.label: 网格高度
inputs.description-en: Height (number of rows) of the sampling area.

inputs.name: radius
inputs.label: 最小距离
inputs.description: 采样点之间的最小距离（像素），值越大点越稀疏
inputs.description-en: Minimum distance between sample points in pixels; larger values produce sparser distributions.

inputs.name: maxAttempts
inputs.label: 最大尝试次数
inputs.description: 每个活跃点周围尝试生成新点的最大次数，值越大采样越密集均匀
inputs.description-en: Maximum attempts to generate a new point around each active point; higher values produce denser, more uniform distributions.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用默认种子，不同种子产生不同分布
inputs.description-en: Random seed; 0 uses default seed. Different seeds produce different distributions.

outputs.name: grid
outputs.label: 采样网格
outputs.description: 输出网格，采样点位置值为 1，其余为 0
outputs.description-en: Output grid; sample point cells = 1, all others = 0.

outputs.name: points
outputs.label: 坐标列表
outputs.description: 所有采样点的坐标数组 [[x, y], ...]，x 为列号，y 为行号（外层 rank=2：N 个点 × [x,y]）
outputs.description-en: Array of sample point coordinates [[x, y], ...]; x=column, y=row (rank=2: N points × [x,y]).

outputs.name: count
outputs.label: 采样点数
outputs.description-en: Total number of sample points generated.
